MODULE: cosmos.interfaces.messaging.discord_adapter
FILE: cosmos/interfaces/messaging/discord_adapter.py (72 lines)
CATEGORY: interfaces

DESCRIPTION: Discord Adapter for cosmos ChatOps.
Connects cosmos to Discord using discord.py patterns.

CLASSES:
- DiscordAdapter(MessagingProvider): Adapter for Discord integration.
Allows cosmos to Act as a Discord Bot (Clawdbot
  Methods: async def connect(self)
  Methods: async def disconnect(self)
  Methods: async def send_message(self, message: OutgoingMessage)
